title: Kylie Jenner dances in face mask and sports bra with friends as Coachella weekend kicks off in the desert
subtitle: N/A
content: close Fox News Flash top entertainment headlines of the week Fox News Flash top entertainment and celebrity headlines are here. NEW You can now listen to Fox News articles! Listen to this article 2 min Kylie Jenner is partying in a sports bra and a face mask as she prepares for Coachella. On Monday morning, Jenner took to Instagram and shared a video with friends Anastasia "Stassie" Karanikolaou and Victoria Villarroel. The trio wore pink face masks as they danced to Frankie Valli's "Can't Take My Eyes Off You." KYLIE JENNER DAZZLES IN DARING WHITE STRING BIKINI FOR POOLSIDE PHOTOS The 28-year-old was wearing yoga pants with one leg rolled up and a shirt with Justin Bieber's face half on. "its just not clocking to you," Jenner captioned her post, referring to the viral video of Bieber confronting paparazzi. Kylie Jenner and friends dancing in face masks before Coachella. (Kylie Jenner/Instagram) Kylie Jenner is preparing for Coachella. (Robert Smith/Getty Images) Prior to the dancing video, Jenner shared a picture of herself in the same outfit, holding an iced coffee and several bags. "chelly day 1!!!!!" she captioned the post. Justin Bieber is headlining Coachella for the first time this year. (Raymond Hall/GC Images) CLICK HERE TO SIGN UP FOR THE ENTERTAINMENT NEWSLETTER Jenner also shared a photo with Karanikolaou in a home gym. She held a water bottle and posed for the photo while Karanikolaou wore a bikini top and shorts. Kylie Jenner and Stassie Karanikolaou before the first day of Coachella. (Kylie Jenner/Instagram) Jenner is not the only star in the desert preparing for the weekend ahead. Influencer Alix Earle shared a picture of herself in a black bikini top and white pants, sitting in the backyard of the Reale Actives house at Coachella. Alix Earle at the Reale Actives Coachella house on Friday. (Alix Earle/Instagram) Hailey Bieber 's friend Fai Khadra shared a video of Hailey and Justine Skye in a blue golf cart. "The First Lady of Coachella," Khadra captioned the video and tagged Hailey. Hailey Bieber at the Fifth Annual Academy Museum Gala held at the Academy Museum of Motion Pictures Oct. 18, 2025, in Los Angeles. (Gilbert Flores/Variety) LIKE WHAT YOU’RE READING? CLICK HERE FOR MORE ENTERTAINMENT NEWS Hailey's husband is headlining Coachella for the first time Saturday night. Fans have coined this year's Coachella "Bieberchella." Sabrina Carpenter shared a picture of dogs wearing "Sabchella" scarfs. (Sabrina Carpenter/Instagram) Sabrina Carpenter is headlining Friday night. Ahead of her big performance, the star shared a picture of two pups on her Instagram story wearing "Sabchella" neck bands. CLICK HERE TO DOWNLOAD THE FOX NEWS APP Janelle Ash is an entertainment writer for Fox News Digital. Story tips can be sent to janelle.ash@fox.com .

title: Coachella 2026: Justin Bieber, Sabrina Carpenter, KATSEYE and others set to perform in California
subtitle: N/A
content: Coachella 2026: Justin Bieber, Sabrina Carpenter, KATSEYE and others set to perform in California Live TV LOGIN v logout Live TV Latest World Pulse World India Entertainment Hollywood Bollywood Sports Cricket Football Opinions videos Photos TV Show Lifestyle Science Tech Iniciar sessão com o Google Iniciar sessão com o Google. Abre num novo separador Wion / Hollywood / Coachella 2026: Justin Bieber, Sabrina Carpenter, KATSEYE and others set to perform in California Coachella 2026: Justin Bieber, Sabrina Carpenter, KATSEYE and others set to perform in California Edited By Snigdha Sweta Behera Published: Apr 10, 2026, 19:04 IST | Updated: Apr 10, 2026, 19:04 IST Coachella 2026 star-studded line-up Photograph: (X) Story highlights This year's Coachella will see renowned celebrities including Sabrina Carpenter and Justin Bieber, among others. Read more to know when and where the event will take place. One of the most-anticipated events is this year's Coachella, which is a music and arts festival that will take place in California. It is the 25th edition of the festival, which will see artists including Justin Bieber and Sabrina Carpenter taking over the stage for live performances. Let's delve in to know who other artists will be joining. Lineup of Coachella 2026 The lineup for the 2026 edition of Coachella was announced last year in September. The headlines confirmed Sabrina Carpenter, Justin Bieber, Karol G (noted as the first Latina artist to headline the festival), and Anyma (debuting his new project Æden). Add WION as a Preferred Source by Taboola by Taboola Sponsored Links Sponsored Links Promoted Links Promoted Links You May Like Mais liberdade depois dos 65? View details Match and combine data from other data sources Information about your activity on this service may be matched and combined with other information relating to you and originating from various sources (for instance your activity on a separate online service, your use of a loyalty card in-store, or your answers to a survey), in support of the purposes explained in this notice. View details Link different devices In support of the purposes explained in this notice, your device might be considered as likely linked to other devices that belong to you or your household (for instance because you are logged in to the same service on both your phone and your computer, or because you may use the same Internet connection on both devices). View details Identify devices based on information transmitted automatically Your device might be distinguished from other devices based on information it automatically sends when accessing the Internet (for instance, the IP address of your Internet connection or the type of browser you are using) in support of the purposes exposed in this notice. View details Use precise geolocation data With your acceptance, your precise location (within a radius of less than 500 metres) may be used in support of the purposes explained in this notice. We need to store these choices to respect them on future visits, and they are stored differently based on the type of site or app you're using: For sites , your choices are saved in a cookie named “FCCDCF” for a maximum duration of 390 days. For apps , your choices are saved in device storage prefixed by “IABTCF_”. Your choices will be invalidated after 390 days and overwritten once you make new privacy choices on this app. For accelerated mobile page (AMP) sites , your choices are saved in local storage prefixed by “amp-store”. Your choices will be invalidated after 390 days and overwritten once you make new privacy choices on this site. title: Coachella YouTube set times revealed: Everything to know for Couchella
subtitle: N/A
content: Coachella YouTube set times: How to watch Sabrina, Bieber from home Skip to main content Home Entertainment Movies Music TV + Radio Dining + Bars Celebrities Coachella YouTube set times revealed: Everything to know for Couchella Coachella YouTube set times revealed: Everything to know for Couchella Didn't make it to the desert this year? No problem. Here are all the YouTube set times to plan a perfect Coachella at home. Adam Graham The Detroit News Coachella is here, which means for everyone who can't make it out to the Southern California desert this weekend, Couchella is just a livestream away. The festival will stream for free on YouTube at youtube.com/coachella . It will unfold on seven different channels, each focusing on a different stage, with three channels — Coachella Stage , Outdoor Theatre and Sahara — streaming in 4K. Festival producers have unveiled the set times for this weekend's streams, which include weekend headliners Sabrina Carpenter, Justin Bieber and Karol G. The livestream kicks off at 7 p.m. eastern time on Friday. Set times are below; all times are Eastern Daylight Time. title: Justin Bieber ignites documentary release speculations ahead of Coachella
subtitle: N/A
content: Justin Bieber ignites documentary release speculations ahead of Coachella Home latest pakistan world sports showbiz entertainment Royal business health Sci-Tech Food Fact Check big picture Videos shows Watch Entertainment Justin Bieber ignites documentary release speculations ahead of Coachella Justin Bieber is headlining Coachella music festival after 'SWAG' and 'SWAG 2' release By Geo News Digital Desk | Published April 05, 2026 Justin Bieber is headlining Coachella music festival after 'SWAG' and 'SWAG 2' release Justin Bieber has raised fans' expectations for his headlining set at Coachella 2026, but it seems the singer has planned more surprises down the line. The 32-year-old pop star has sparked rumours of a companion documentary to be released after his performance at the music festival. The Daisies hitmaker will be performing on both the Saturdays - April 11 and April 18 during the festival, and an anonymous tipster claimed that the "well known former teen heartthrob/ a list popstar has teamed up with Netflix to follow and film their journey" ahead of Coachella, as per DeuxMoi. The documentary is said to be similar to Beyonce, and fans unanimously agreed that the unnamed personality is none other than Bieber. The Grammy winner will be delivering his first major performance at the Coachella stage ever since he cancelled his 2022 tour. Bieber recently gave a taste of his comeback era to fans at the Grammys 2026 as he performed his new song Yukon . title: From pop to indie rock, these are the artists taking the Coachella stage
subtitle: N/A
content: Coachella 2026: Justin Bieber and Sabrina Carpenter lead the lineup Shows Spotlight Watch now Live On-demand Schedule Liga MX NEWSLETTER Find us on X Find us on TikTok Find us on YouTube Find us on Instagram Find us on Facebook Search the LatiNation website WATCH NOW Watch on the app NEWSLETTER Ads powered by Latest 1 Business & Finance Lionel Messi’s garage has one untouchable Ferrari leading the collection 2 Celebrities The rising ‘Euphoria’ actress who almost played one of ‘Game of Thrones’ darkest roles 3 Celebrities Vanessa Bryant addressed a new man after Kobe Bryant and pregnancy rumors 4 Entertainment One Piece remake release date, episode count and plot details revealed 5 Artists How Bad Bunny created his Met Gala 2026 look: prosthetics, fashion and meaning explained 6 Artists Ángela Aguilar and Christian Nodal spark secret wedding rumors, do they already have a date? 7 Entertainment Netflix’s new No.1 thriller is dividing viewers but people can’t stop watching 8 Business & Finance New York’s hidden housing oasis offers rents under $1,200 that feel like old-school prices 9 Business & Finance One of the world’s biggest economies is being powered by an unexpected force in the U.S. 10 Celebrities Maluma backstage revelation at Met Gala 2026 adds a twist to the night 11 Fan Life Real Madrid consider selling Kylian Mbappé as transfer market turbulence grows with Vinícius Jr, Marc Cucurella and more 12 Fan Life College Football Top 25 rankings after spring ball: Where teams stand in the early race 13 Fan Life USC vs UCLA recruiting battle is a silent war as top classes prepare their weapons for the Big Ten era Culture Entertainment Music Beauty & Fashion Health & Wellness Sports Hustle 04.01.26 | Home Music From pop to indie rock, these are the artists taking the Coachella stage Coachella 2026 will feature the long-awaited debut of Justin Bieber as a headliner alongside rising star Sabrina Carpenter. Structural bands like The Strokes and The xx return to the desert to reaffirm the lasting power of alternative rock for new generations. The Latino presence stands out with innovative acts like Karol G, Mëstiza, and Rusowsky, who bring club culture and flamenco to the Empire Polo Club. The California desert prepares to host one of the most ambitious editions in its history, establishing Coachella 2026 as the epicenter of global trends in The United States. This year’s programming achieves a perfect balance between the nostalgia of iconic bands and the energy of artists currently dominating the charts; therefore, the spotlight shines on Justin Bieber, who takes on the headliner role for the first time after years of sporadic appearances. Selena's Legacy Lives on at the Grammy Museum 0 seconds of 3 minutes, 12 seconds Volume 0% Press shift question mark to access a list of keyboard shortcuts Keyboard Shortcuts Enabled Disabled Shortcuts Open/Close / or ? Play/Pause SPACE Increase Volume ↑ Decrease Volume ↓ Seek Forward → Seek Backward ← Captions On/Off c Fullscreen/Exit Fullscreen f Mute/Unmute m Decrease Caption Size - Increase Caption Size + or = Seek % 0-9 Next Up Get2Know Estevie: Boiled Eggs, Lime & Telenovela Fantasy 04:00 0.5x 1x 1.25x 1.5x 2x facebook reddit Email x linkedin tumblr pinterest Link https://cdn.jwplayer.com/previews/bWJEO3NM Copied Live 00:00 03:12 03:12 More Videos Selena's Legacy Lives on at the Grammy Museum Get2Know Estevie: Boiled Eggs, Lime & Telenovela Fantasy Joss Favela Piropo Challenge Get2Know Sofia Monroy: Identity, Spanglish Music & Being Swedish-Mexican Get2Know Delilah: Love, Lessons & the Music That Defines Her Who is Judeline? 3x Latin Grammy Nominee View Source Video Alongside him, Sabrina Carpenter arrives powered by the success of her most recent album, proving that pop with ironic undertones is the preferred language of Gen Z; consequently, the two weekends in April promise to be a showcase of sonic and visual innovation. Furthermore, indie fans will also have their space with the return of The xx after eight years of silence; likewise, the diversity of genres ensures an eclectic experience for all attendees. The pulse of rock and experimental electronics Various key acts define the identity of this edition, highlighting the sonic collision of Nine Inch Noize, the mysterious project uniting Trent Reznor with the power of German techno; furthermore, New York bands like Interpol and Geese will provide that post-punk and rock atmosphere that is always part of the festival’s DNA. In addition, high-profile electronics will be represented by Major Lazer, tasked with closing out the Sundays with a collective celebration of global rhythms; similarly, the legendary David Byrne promises to transform his set into a piece of conceptual art that challenges traditional stage hierarchies. Ultimately, Coachella 2026 is not just a massive concert; it is a thermometer of artistic relevance in the digital age. Along those lines, the inclusion of artists like Lykke Li and Foster the People reinforces a narrative of introspection and reinvention that resonates deeply with today’s audience. Emerging talent and the pride of the Latino community Additionally, the festival opens its doors to unique proposals that are redefining the independent market, such as Los Retros and their bedroom pop with Latino roots; in fact, the presence of Spanish artists like Rusowsky and the duo Mëstiza underscores the impact of Hispanic culture on the most influential stages of The United States. Mëstiza will bring their fusion of flamenco and electronics to reclaim their roots on the dance floor, while Carolina Durante will present their ironic indie sound that is conquering Europe. The lineup is completed by powerful voices like Little Simz, whose reflective rap is considered one of the season’s most memorable acts; likewise, Iceland’s Laufey will provide a dose of contemporary jazz to balance the event’s intensity. In this sense, every artist selected for Coachella 2026 represents a key piece in the mapping of the current musical landscape. As you can see, the Empire Polo Club will be the stage for a sonic odyssey that celebrates the constant evolution of world entertainment. The Coachella 2026 Must-See Lineup The desert will witness a massive collision of styles, and to make sure you don’t miss a single beat, we’ve categorized the key acts taking over the Empire Polo Club this April: The Headliners & Pop Icons: Justin Bieber (in his big solo debut), Sabrina Carpenter (the new face of pop), and the global force of Karol G. Indie & Alternative Legends: The Strokes, The xx (returning after 8 years), Interpol, Lykke Li, and Foster the People. Experimental & Electronic Power: Major Lazer, Nine Inch Noize (Trent Reznor + Boys Noize), Anyma, and the legendary David Byrne. Rising Indie & Alt Voices: Laufey, Geese, Blondshell, BINI, KATSEYE, Sombr, and Addison Rae. Rap & Lyricism: The fierce and introspective Little Simz. The Latino & Spanish Wave: Mëstiza, Rusowsky, Los Retros, and Carolina Durante. title: Get Coachella tickets now to see Sabrina Carpenter, Justin Bieber + more
subtitle: N/A
content: How to buy Coachella 2026 tickets, Sabrina Carpenter, Justin Bieber Skip to main content Home Local Sports Things to Do Nation Now Business Travel & Explore Politics Opinion Investigations eNewspaper Advertise with Us Obituaries Archives Crosswords Newsletters AZ International Auto Show & New Car Buyer's Guide 2020 Model Year Connect With Us For Subscribers Contributor Content Shopping Israel War Home & Garden Ideas Grocery Shopping USA 250 Get Coachella tickets now to see Sabrina Carpenter, Justin Bieber + more Get Coachella tickets now to see Sabrina Carpenter, Justin Bieber + more Trisha Easto USA TODAY The 2026 Coachella Music Festival is officially on the horizon, and the hype is real. This massive concert usually kicks off music festival season in the California desert , and this year’s lineup is nothing short of legendary, with Justin Bieber , Sabrina Carpenter and Karol G set to take the stage. Coachella will take place from April 10-12 and then again from April 17-19 . The road to the desert began in Fall 2025 when the lineup first dropped, followed by the official ticket release on Friday, September 19 . While fans can still find official passes through AXS , secondary options are also available via StubHub . While tickets are still available , they are moving at record speed. If you’re planning to make the trek to Indio, the clock is ticking—grab your passes now before they're gone for good! Get Coachella tickets now Shop Coachella Tickets As of publication, Coachella tickets are on sale and available. The cheapest tickets are starting at $1,310 . Plus, shuttle passes and camping passes are also still available. title: Justin Bieber's rumoured Coachella set has been revealed - it's leaving fans divided
subtitle: N/A
content: Justin Bieber's rumoured Coachella set has been revealed - it's leaving fans divided Home > Entertainment > Music Updated 16:14 8 Apr 2026 GMT+1 Published 16:13 8 Apr 2026 GMT+1 Justin Bieber's rumoured Coachella set has been revealed - it's leaving fans divided Canadian singer Justin Bieber's concert comeback comes after his 'Justice' tour was cancelled in 2023 following health concerns Rhianna Benson Follow us on Google Discover In just three days' time, Justin Bieber will headline Coachella's main stage, marking his first concert performance since 2023. Unfortunately for the Canadian hit-maker, however, Bieber's rumoured set-list has been leaked to the public. And apparently, people aren't pleased. Bieber famously abandoned his last concert tour, Justice, three years ago to prioritise his health following a diagnosis of Ramsay Hunt syndrome. Advert Naturally, fans were elated when festival organisers announced back in September that the 32-year-old would be making his long-awaited return. Advert The speculation regarding his rumoured setlist was kick-started by residents of Indio, California, who live close to the Colorado Desert where the A-list concert takes place every spring. Nearby residents shared recordings of Bieber's rehearsals online (Frazer Harrison/Getty Images for Coachella) According to Indy100 , these locals have been recording footage of rehearsals and spreading them online. As a result, some die-hard 'Beliebers' think they've pieced together the singer's itinerary for the show. Many have agreed that one piece of audio from the viral video sounds like Bieber's 2012 banger, 'Beauty and a Beat'. Another supposedly sounds just like 'Sorry', a 2015 anthem from his Purpose album. Others have predicted that the father-of-one will also play a number of his oldest hits, after audio footage that sounded a lot like 'One Less Lonely Girl' and 'Baby', from his 2009 My World album, began circulating. It's also believed that Bieber will perform a number of covers, including one of Chris Brown's most famous tracks, With You. Bieber will headline Coachella on Saturday (Jeff Kravitz/Getty Images for Triller) The song first gained Bieber mass traction in 2008, when he uploaded a cover to YouTube. Scooter Braun stumbled across the 13-year-old and signed him to a record deal. Summarising what fans believe to be his most likely performances, the account Buzzing Pop wrote on X: "Songs Justin Bieber has been heard rehearsing for his #Coachella set: With You (Chris Brown cover), So Sick (Ne-Yo cover), Sorry, Favourite Girl, One Less Lonely Girl, Baby, All That Matters." Advert As we say, however, the leaked list has proven a source of disagreement amongst Bieber's fans, several of whom have criticised his possible plans to perform a track by Chris Brown, who carries a long history of domestic violence and assault allegations. "Chris brown……. cover?" one double-checked. Bieber shot to fame after sharing a cover of 'With You' on YouTube in 2008 (HENNING KAISER/DDP/AFP via Getty Images) Another hit out: "Does he not remember his songs or?" "If he sings a cover at this coachella it won't make the SLIGHTEST sense with all the songs he has to put on the setlist (especially with an abuser's song in the mix)," a third continued. Others, however, are thrilled by the idea of Bieber taking a trip back in time. "With You.. the cover that started it all… im going to cry," one gushed. Another defended the decision, adding: "Ya'll mad at him for covering ah Chris brown song that made him blow up quit crying." "With You cover??? Lesss gooooooo," a third went on. Featured Image Credit: Joseph Okpako/WireImage Topics: Justin Bieber , Celebrity , Music , US News , Coachella , Festivals Rhianna Benson Rhianna is an Entertainment Journalist at LADbible Group, working across LADbible, UNILAD and Tyla. She has a Masters in News Journalism from the University of Salford and a Masters in Ancient History from the University of Edinburgh. She previously worked as a Celebrity Reporter for OK! and New Magazines, and as a TV Writer for Reach PLC. Photos Advertising 2026 Golf Card Sweet Deals PopularImages / Depositphotos.com Justin Bieber’s Roxy Takeover: A ‘Sneak Preview’ of Coachella 2026 Apr 2, 2026 | 2:50 AM Justin Bieber stepped back onto a live stage in Los Angeles days before Coachella, giving fans a rare, close-up performance. The appearance took place at a small venue, where attendees shared clips showing a relaxed set and a crowd packed tightly around the stage. According to details from the event, the show featured a mix of familiar hits and quieter moments, with Bieber interacting casually between songs. The setting stood in contrast to his usual arena-scale performances, offering a more personal experience for those in the room. The performance comes as Bieber has kept a relatively low public profile in recent months. His return to a live audience, even in a limited capacity, signals renewed activity without the scale of a full tour. Fans in attendance described the atmosphere as informal and focused on the music. There were no elaborate visuals or major production elements, just a stripped-down setup that highlighted vocals and connection with the audience. The timing, just ahead of Coachella weekend , has drawn attention to what could come next, though no additional appearances have been confirmed. title: Coachella Weekend Showtimes Announced: Sabrina Carpenter, Justin Bieber, Karol G
subtitle: N/A
content: Coachella Weekend Showtimes Announced: Sabrina Carpenter, Justin Bieber, Karol G  | Palm Desert, CA Patch Skip to main content Nearby Communities Palm Springs, CA Banning-Beaumont, CA Temecula, CA Murrieta, CA Redlands-Loma Linda, CA Lake Elsinore-Wildomar, CA Ramona, CA Escondido, CA Poway, CA Oceanside-Camp Pendleton, CA State Edition California National Edition Top National News See All Communities Thank you to our Local Business Sponsor: Law Offices of Soda & Greenberg Arts & Entertainment Coachella Weekend Showtimes Announced: Sabrina Carpenter, Justin Bieber, Karol G When should you head to that main stage during Weekend One of Coachella Music & Arts Festival? Here's everything you need to know. Ashley Ludwig , Patch Staff Posted Tue, Apr  7, 2026 at 12:02 pm PT COACHELLA, CA — Are you ready for Coachella 2026? The first weekend's set times for the Coachella Valley Music and Arts Festival are out. The festival begins Friday in Indio, at the Empire Polo Club, located at 81-800 51st Ave., with gates set to open at 1 p.m. This weekend's headlines will all appear on the Coachella Main Stage from opening night to the end of the weekend. editorial credit: James Veysey;Allpix Press;Sergio R Moreno/GTRES/Shutterstock On Friday from 9:05 to 10:35 p.m., Sabrina Carpenter will take the mic. On Saturday, at 11:25 p.m., Justin Bieber will perform. Lastly, Karol G will close the show at 9:55 p.m. on Sunday. Find out what's happening in Palm Desert for free with the latest updates from Patch. Subscribe The full schedule can be found on the festival website, www.coachella.com/schedule . Friday's performers will include Teddy Swims, Dijon, Hot Mulligan, Blood Orange, Sexyy Red, Hugel, Max Styler and others. Find out what's happening in Palm Desert for free with the latest updates from Patch. Subscribe Saturday's performances will include The Strokes, Giveon, David Byrne, Morat, Jack White, Boys Noize and David Guetta. The last day of Weekend One will include Young Thug, Foster The People, Iggy Pop, Suicidal Tendencies, Bunt, WhoMadeWho and Fatboy Slim. Organizers also shared on social media that this year's festival will include the "Bunker Debut of Radiohead Motion Picture House Kid A Mnesia," an exhibit of sketches, paintings, collages, audio recordings, handwritten notes and a 75-minute large-format film made from thousands of fragments created by Radiohead lead singer Thom Yorke and English artist Stanley Donwood. Radiohead is not scheduled to perform at the festival. The festival will conclude the weekend of April 17-19. More information can be found at www.coachella.com . title: Coachella 2026 kicks off with Sabrina Carpenter, Justin Bieber, and Karol G

content: Coachella 2026 kicks off with Sabrina Carpenter, Justin Bieber, and Karol G | TAG24 With your agreement, we and our 10 partners use cookies or similar technologies to store, access, and process personal data like your visit on this website, IP addresses and cookie identifiers. We and our partners process data for the following purposes: Personalised advertising and content, advertising and content measurement, audience research and services development , Precise geolocation data, and identification through device scanning , Store and/or access information on a device Learn More → Agree and close 04/10/2026, 07:35 AM Coachella 2026 kicks off with Sabrina Carpenter, Justin Bieber, and Karol G Indio, California - Thousands of fans have gathered in the California desert for the hotly anticipated Coachella Music Festival, which kicks off Friday with pop princess Sabrina Carpenter in the spotlight. Sabrina Carpenter is the headliner for night one of Coachella 2026. © KEVIN WINTER / GETTY IMAGES NORTH AMERICA / GETTY IMAGES VIA AFP The star-studded line-up – which also includes headliners Justin Bieber and Colombia's Karol G – will grace the stage in Indio on two consecutive weekends, kicking off the US music festival circuit for 2026. Friday's acts include standout emerging talent Teddy Swims and girl group KATSEYE, as well as established artists like Moby. But the opening night highlight will be Carpenter, who promised "the most ambitious show" of her career. Ariana Grande Ariana Grande sparks fan frenzy with tease of her tour setlist! The Manchild singer made her Coachella debut in 2024, when she released the catchy summer hit Espresso. Closing out the first day will be Italian DJ Anyma, who will premiere his new production, ÆDEN, an immersive audiovisual experience that will hit the road after Coachella for a tour including stops in Milan, London, and Seoul. You must accept cookies to view this content Accept all cookies You must accept cookies to view this content Accept all cookies Justin Bieber set to perform at Coachella "Bieber Fever" started spreading after Justin Bieber's appearance at the 2026 Grammy Awards in February. © KEVIN WINTER / GETTY IMAGES NORTH AMERICA / GETTY IMAGES VIA AFP The party continues across Coachella's nine stages on Saturday, with Justin Bieber's highly anticipated appearance to close out the night. After a decade-long hiatus, "Bieber fever" seems to have returned after the singer's Grammy Awards comeback , and it's spreading across the Coachella Valley. Fans of the 32-year-old artist posted videos on social media this week of what appear to be rehearsals of hits such as Sorry and Where Are U Now. Kim Kardashian Kim Kardashian makes big call on her law journey after failing bar exam Saturday night also features performances by techno stalwarts Armin van Buuren and Adam Beyer, K-pop stars Taemin, and British dance sensation PinkPantheress. French DJ and producer David Guetta returns to the desert in Indio, and David Byrne, the legendary co-founder of Talking Heads, will make an appearance. Another highly anticipated act is Nine Inch Noize – a collaboration between the industrial rock band Nine Inch Nails and German producer Boys Noize – which has just announced a joint album. As a testament to the diversity of genres on display at Coachella, the festival's main stage will host influencer-turned-singer Addison Rae. New York rockers The Strokes will also perform . Led by Julian Casablancas, the band returns with a new album slated for June, following a six-year hiatus. You must accept cookies to view this content Accept all cookies Karol G set to wow at Coachella Reggaeton star Karol G will be the first Latina headliner at Coachella. © Screenshot/Instagram/Karol G The cherry on top for Sunday will be reggaeton star Karol G, the first Latina to headline the festival. The winner of eight Latin Grammy Awards made her Coachella debut in 2022 with a performance that paid tribute to Latin music icons such as Selena, Celia Cruz, and Daddy Yankee. For this year's show, the Provenza singer is expected to embrace the Caribbean showgirl aesthetic of her latest project, Tropicoqueta. Sunday also promises the festival debut of K-pop kings BIGBANG, who are celebrating their 20th anniversary with a highly anticipated return to the international stage. Also appearing will be the godfather of punk, Iggy Pop, and Fatboy Slim – the British DJ and producer who dominated the electronic music scene in the 1990s. Other acts include Major Lazer, indie-pop band Foster the People, and British singer, dancer, and visual artist FKA twigs. The festival will close with a screening under the stars of the first episode of the third season of Euphoria , the HBO high school drama series starring Zendaya, returning to television after four years. You must accept cookies to view this content Accept all cookies Coachella 2026 will also be streamed live on YouTube. title: Justin Bieber's 2026 Coachella Set List Seemingly Leaked — What Songs Will He Be Performing?
subtitle: N/A
content: Justin Bieber's Coachella 2026 Set List Leaks on Social Media toggle Pop star and former child superstar Justin Bieber has had a rough couple of years. From struggling with substance use and mental health challenges to marriage and becoming a father, he's really been going through it. Coachella 2026 was a chance for him to bring it all back in and prove that he can come through it stronger than before. Article continues below advertisement But a Love Island star may have just stolen some of his thunder after sharing a leak of his supposed set list for Coachella , and turning the conversation to Justin's choice of songs. Here's what we know about that leak. Source: Instagram Article continues below advertisement Here's that rumored set list leak for Justin Bieber's Coachella 2026 performance. Being in the right place at the right time is a brag. Love Island: USA star Nic Vansteenberghe can make. Outside of the Coachella venue, he was able to hear Justin apparently practicing for his 2026 set list and drop the deets on which songs will be making it to the stage for Beliebers to gush over. According to Nic, who filmed himself reacting excitedly to the songs he overheard, this is the set list to expect: "Sorry" "With You" "So Sick" "Favorite Girl" "One Less Lonely Girl" "Baby" "I'm the One" "All That Matters" "Beauty and a Beat" "Where R U Now" "Daisies" "Yukon" "Devotion" "Love Song" "I Do" "Speed Demon." Article continues below advertisement According to Nic, this is just "The rumor going around town," and only time will tell if that's the real set list. But given the fact that Justin is known for mixing some of his old hits with newer favorites, it seems pretty realistic. Source: Threads / @nicolasvans Article continues below advertisement Fans are stoked about Bieber's chance to make a comeback. Let's face it, the last five years haven't been easy for Justin. Not only has he grappled with his own demons, but the release of the Epstein files, in part, has renewed conversations about abuses in Hollywood and the way young children who are in close proximity to powerful people often get abused. For someone like Justin, whose fans suspect he experienced trauma during his years as a child star, it can all be very triggering and challenging. Add this to the fact that he became a father for the first time in 2024, and you have a recipe for an extraordinarily challenging phase in life for someone who never had a chance to develop normally, spending formative years under the microscope of fame. Which is why fans are so excited and hopeful that Coachella 2026 will be a time of renewal for Justin. Article continues below advertisement On social media, fans are cheering on his throwback set list and hoping that this turns into a triumph for Justin instead of another public embarrassment. But one thing hasn't escaped their notice: "Beauty and a Beat" has the potential to stir some drama. One fan wrote on TikTok, "Now why tf would he play Beauty and a Beat knowing Nicki is hella hated rn, and it has Selener in itt... for the plot I guess." Source: TikTok / @nowtoronto The song, originally performed with Nicki Minaj, could be a public relations landmine for Justin. In 2026, Minaj came out as rabidly pro-MAGA , isolating a significant portion of her fan base, who felt betrayed. Does Justin plan to bring her back or just dance around the void left behind by her absence? Either way, Coachella 2026 promises to be one for the headlines. Privacy Policy Storage Preferences Targeted Advertising Personalization Analytics Save Accept All Reject Non-Essential Close Cookie Preferences EXPLORE SHOP EXPLORE EVENTS STYLE SNEAKERS MUSIC SPORTS POP CULTURE BETS LIFE COVER STORIES WATCH STYLE 2026 Met Gala Best Dressed Met Gala Themes 10 Best, Ranked Met Gala History A Complex Quiz The Iceman Drake's Best Jewelry SHOP EXPLORE EVENTS GET THE APP STYLE SNEAKERS POP CULTURE SPORTS BETS LIFE SHOWS Music SKYLRK Shares New Collection Ahead of Justin Bieber’s Coachella Headlining Set The two shows will mark Bieber's inaugural headlining performances at the festival. By tara mahadevan April 3, 2026 Share ADD COMPLEX ON GOOGLE via SKYLRK SKYLRK has returned with a new collection ahead of Justin Bieber ’s headlining Coachella set. On Friday, the expansive release Drop 11 arrived with the debut of the Sizzler phone case, a remix of Bieber’s wife, Haley Bieber ’s Rhode lip gloss phone case. However, SKYLRK’s iteration has a recreational flair, allowing fans to fill the slot with pre-role essentials. The phone case is available in four colors: Cave, Sky, Gum, and Aqua Kiwi. As for apparel, SKYLRK has fans ready for festival season with Denim Shorts in Blanket and Raw washes, the Waffle 3/4 Short in Melon and Pebble, Waffle Mocknecks in Oat and Smude, and beanies in Pine and Smudge. The brand’s footwear has also received an upgrade, with the Sunken Mule now available in Coral, Bear, Cove, and Cave. SKYLRK teamed up with Zellerfeld to introduce the Cave colorway of the Earth Bender silhouette. And don’t forget new socks in the Babe and Lime colorway. Bieber is set to take the stage in Indio, California on April 11 and April 18. He reportedly pulled a number north of $10 million for the two sets , which will be his inaugural headlining performances at the music festival. Shop Drop 11 on SKYLRK.com . title: Justin Bieber Performs Small Show at Troubadour in L.A. Ahead of Coachella Set
subtitle: N/A
content: Justin Bieber Performs Small Show at Troubadour in L.A. Ahead of Coachella Set Comic's Set Trashing Keegan-Michael Key's Wife Is 'Outlandish, Fabricated,' Sources Say Kara Del Toro’s Canouan Getaway Heats Up -- Bikini Pics Bring the Sizzle! 'Summer House' West Wilson's Alleged Murderer Cousin Dakota Could Face Mental Exam Shay Mitchell vs. Hassie Harrison Who'd You Rather?! ('Baywatch' Babes Edition) 'White Lotus' Sam Nivola Says Helena Bonham Carter's Sudden Exit Not Shocking Getty Justin Bieber is gearing up for his Coachella comeback ... he played an intimate set at the Troubadour in West Hollywood Saturday night. This is JB's second L.A. gig recently -- he also put on a secret show at the Roxy on March 29 -- ahead of his headlining set at the Indio, CA music festival. View this post on Instagram According to Setlist FM , Biebs has been skipping the hits and playing songs from "SWAG" and "SWAG II" ... leading fans to believe his Coachella sets on April 11 and April 18 will be more of the same. Videos show Justin performing songs like "YUKON," "GO BABY," "DAISIES," and more from the two-part release. It's unclear if he'll be playing his chart-toppers in the desert ... he sold his entire back catalog to Hipgnosis a few years ago -- meaning the company now owns all six studio albums he dropped between 2010 and 2021. title: Kylie Jenner Arrives at Coachella Decked Out in Justin Bieber Merch
subtitle: N/A
content: Kylie Jenner Arrives at Coachella Decked Out in Justin Bieber Merch - Newsweek Your Privacy Choices We and our partners use cookies and other technologies to store and access information on your device to process personal data (such as IP address and unique identifiers) for the purposes of personalised advertising and content, measurement, analytics, audience research, identification through device scanning, and service development. You can accept, reject or manage your choices below or at any time by clicking on the “Privacy Settings” link at the bottom of the site. Your consent choices will be propagated to our partners listed in “Privacy Settings”. If our partners process data on the basis of legitimate interest, you may object to such processing by clicking ‘Object to Legitimate Interest’ on the vendors section of “Privacy Settings”. To learn more, please view our Privacy Policy . Accept All Reject All Customize Settings Latest Inside the Cruise Ship Struck by Hantavirus Outbreak U.S. News Politics Tech Fact Check Sports Global Russia-Ukraine Middle East China And Asia Live Blog Better Planet All World News Lifestyle Family & Parenting Entertainment Travel Pets Automotive Relationships Science Health Personal Finance Better Workplaces Readers Choice Opinion My Turn All Opinion Rankings Health Finance Products Education Workplaces Corporate Responsibility All Rankings Social Facebook Instagram Threads YouTube Reddit TikTok Twitter/X Extra Newsletters Newsmakers Unconventional Events Podcasts Vantage Magazine CEO Circle Announcements Leadership Dev Pragad Timothée Chalamet Wins First Golden Globes For Best Actor Video 3 Timothée Chalamet Wins First Golden Globes For Best Actor Related Videos Sally Field on ‘Remarkably Bright Creatures’ and Why She Isn’t Done Yet JayDon On Evolution And Musical Growth Timothée Chalamet Wins First Golden Globes For Best Actor By Megan Armstrong 0 Share Newsweek is a Trust Project member See more of our trusted coverage when you search. Prefer Newsweek on Google to see more of our trusted coverage when you search. Sabrina Carpenter will headline Coachella 2026 on Friday night, but Kylie Jenner is only at the Empire Polo Club in Indio, California, for one reason: to watch Justin Bieber headline on Saturday night. On Friday, Jenner posted an Instagram photo showing her triumphant Coachella arrival. In the photo, the self-made billionaire is wearing a sparkling tank top displaying Bieber throwing up two birds. Jenner also has two fully loaded SKYLRK bags, and she's standing in front of a SKYLRK-branded cart. Hailey Bieber, Justin's wife of more than seven years, has been extremely close with Kylie and Kendall Jenner since the early 2010s. SKYLRK is Bieber's clothing and lifestyle brand, which will have an expansive presence on the Coachella grounds, according to Outlander Magazine . This weekend is paramount for Bieber because he is making his Coachella headlining debut, but it's more significant than that. Bieber parted ways with longtime manager Scooter Braun and his SB Projects management company sometime after the cancellation of his Justice World Tour in early 2023, and Braun retired as a music manager altogether in June 2024. We got our first taste of a totally free Bieber, creative or otherwise, when he released his genre-melding, Grammy-nominated album "SWAG" last July. Bieber doubled down on his newfound vision — or, really,  his return to his pop/R&B roots — when he surprisingly dropped "SWAG II" last September. Justin Bieber performs onstage during the 68th GRAMMY Awards at Crypto.com Arena on February 01, 2026 in Los Angeles, California. | Kevin Winter / Staff/Getty Images Entertainment Bieber caught everyone's attention with his intentionally bare performance of "YUKON" at the 2026 Grammys in February. It was just a shirtless and shoeless Bieber, a guitar, a loop machine, and a microphone. In some ways, it felt symbolic. After being puppeteered by handlers and the industry since he was 13, Bieber doesn't want anything between him and the music. As one of the defining pop stars of his generation, Bieber played innumerable massive shows. His headlining 2022 Rock In Rio set drew over 100,000 people . Bieber's headlining Coachella sets on April 11 and April 18 will rival that capacity. The stage won't be too big. For one, as he reminded the world at the Grammys, Bieber's pure vocal talent is enough to captivate for hours. But most of all? Justin Bieber is finally singing for himself again.
